title: Federal Aviation Administration
description: Got a question about unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) or drones? The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) is ready to help you! You can visit our Frequently Asked Questions about drones for answers to many commonly asked questions. You can use our contact form or call the FAA's UAS Support Center at 844-FLY-MY-UA (844-359-6982).
text:
Got a question about unmanned aircraft systems (UAS) or drones? The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) is ready to help you!
You can visit our Frequently Asked Questions about drones for answers to many commonly asked questions.
You can use our contact form or call the FAA's UAS Support Center at 844-FLY-MY-UA (844-359-6982).
Reporting Drones
What do you do if you see a drone being operated in a dangerous manner or being used to commit a crime? Learn what you can do at our How do I report a drone sighting? webpage.
Thank you and fly safe!
